title: x-tra silky mediterranean lamb wrap
description: lazy sunday dish featuring rosemary, ssam-wrap, kosher-friendly. perfect for a light and easy meal.
instructions: preheat oven to 400f. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
in a small bowl, mix together olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
place the lamb shoulder on the prepared baking sheet and brush the mixture evenly over both sides of the lamb.
add the rosemary sprigs on top of the lamb and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
remove the lamb from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Meanwhile, toast the ssam-wrap in a dry pan over medium heat for 1-2 minutes or until lightly browned.
spread a tablespoon of tzatziki sauce on each wrap, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
add sliced lamb, red onion, and feta cheese on top of the sauce.
fold the bottom edge of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
repeat with the remaining ingredients to make 4-6 wraps.
